name: Wolf Pack
description: Territorial pack predators. Dangerous in groups, avoidable alone.

sensory.sight: grey shapes low to the ground, eyes reflecting firelight
sensory.sound: howling in the distance, then silence, then panting close by
sensory.feel: the sense of being watched from multiple directions

encounter_hooks: tracks around the campsite in the morning
howling that follows the party for an hour
a deer carcass, fresh, abandoned mid-meal
notes: Wolves are smart. They test before they commit. A lone wolf watching from treeline is a scout, not a threat.
